changelog:
- 新增升级/维护通知横幅：提前预告、不打断任务、可按版本隐藏
- 配方编辑器选中区域新增清晰描边，缩放时始终可见
- 修复预览图坐标偏移，优化分辨率自适应
- 提升内存使用效率与长时间运行下的服务稳定性
- 修复参数面板开关偶发重复渲染的问题
changelog_en:
- New upgrade/maintenance banner: advance notice, non-disruptive, dismissible per revision
- Added clear outlines for selected regions in recipe editor, visible at all zoom levels
- Fixed preview coordinate offset and improved adaptive resolution
- Improved memory efficiency and service stability under long-running workloads
- Fixed occasional duplicate rendering when toggling parameter panel switches
